name: web_discover
description: Discover websites, media, or reusable assets. Without download_dir, website mode returns cleaned text and media/asset modes return links. With download_dir, websites are saved as cleaned Markdown, media files are downloaded, and asset archives are extracted into typed folders. A single website or direct file URL is fetched directly.

cli.description: Optional CLI-form command line. Example: asset 3d "space cruiser" --download-dir assets

asset_type.description: Asset subtype for type=asset. Supports shader, texture, 2d, 3d, audio, or auto.

query.description: Literal search query, direct webpage URL, or direct media/asset file URL. Use explicit CLI fields such as include_regex and exclude_regex for filtering.

include_regex.description: Optional regex that result title/url/snippet must match.

exclude_regex.description: Optional regex that result title/url/snippet must not match.

download_dir.description: Workspace-relative or absolute directory for saved files. If omitted, nothing is downloaded or saved. Asset downloads are placed in subtype folders and zip files are extracted.

min_size.description: Minimum downloaded media or asset file size in bytes.

max_size.description: Maximum downloaded media or asset file size in bytes.

format.description: yt-dlp format selector for video/audio downloads, for example best[height<=540][ext=mp4]/best[height<=540]/best.
